ops.title: Strip pre-v9 capt-hook wiring from cc-notes-n1 .claude/settings.json
ops.description: The scratch clone ~/Code/cc-notes-n1 (bookmark trackd-n1, fusekit v0.37.0 WIP) still carries full pre-v9.0.0 hook wiring in .claude/settings.json: 9 events running 'uvx capt-hook run <Event>' plus 'uvx capt-hook review run' on SessionEnd. The 2026-07-11 fleet sweep missed it (not in the gh repo list roster). Deliberately NOT fixed live: the clone has active foreign WIP and any jj command there auto-snapshots it; interim double-fires are bounded (only sessions inside that clone; once-guard collapses all but decision events) and it self-heals if trackd-n1 rebases onto swept main (its commits do not touch settings.json). Action when picked up: if the clone still exists and trackd-n1 has not rebased, strip the hooks key from .claude/settings.json (coordinate with the clone owner; inspect via git -C only, never jj -R). If the clone is gone, close as met.

ops.text: cc-notes-n1/.claude/settings.json has no hooks key (or the clone is retired)
